abstract: Comprehensive guide for Tigris Storage object operations, designed for AI agents and LLMs. Covers all six core object operations: put (upload), get (download), remove (delete), list (enumerate), head (metadata), and getPresignedUrl (time-limited access). Details upload options including access controls and content types, download format options (string/file/stream), prefix-based listing with pagination, presigned URL generation for browser-based uploads, and the TigrisStorageResponse error handling pattern. Each operation includes TypeScript examples, parameter descriptions, and common usage patterns.
